source.sections: Ch 3 (Actions -- Tables 3.1-3.4, 3.29, 3.31-3.35, Figures 3.7/3.8), Ch 10 (Culverts -- Sections 10.2-10.5, Figure 10.3)

lm1_characteristic_values.description: Load Model 1 characteristic values per notional lane (Table 3.4)
lm1_characteristic_values.notes: Each axle of tandem system has two identical wheels. Load per wheel = 0.5 x alpha_Qi x Q_ik. Contact surface is square of side 0.40 m.

lm1_adjustment_factors.description: Adjustment factors for LM1 -- Kenya NDP values (Table 3.3, based on UK National Annex)
lm1_adjustment_factors.notes: alpha_Qi, alpha_qi, and alpha_qr are Nationally Determined Parameters (NDPs). Values from Table 3.3 of RDM 4.2.

partial_factors_str_set_b.description: Partial factors for STR limit state -- Set B (Table 3.32)
partial_factors_str_set_b.notes: From RDM 4.2 Table 3.32. gamma_Q = 0 where favourable.

partial_factors_equ_set_a.description: Partial factors for EQU limit state -- Set A (Table 3.31)

wheel_dispersal_through_fill.description: Dispersal of wheel loads through fill to buried structures (Section 10.4.7, Figure 10.3)

through_earth_fill.formula: dispersed_length = contact_dimension + 2 x H_c x tan(30)

wheel_dispersal_through_fill.notes: Structures with H_c < 0.6 m treated as bridge structures with direct loading. Structures with H_c >= 0.6 m use 30-degree dispersal through fill. When near wing wall or head wall, dispersal zone may be curtailed (Section 10.4.7).

model_factor_earth_cover.description: Supplementary model factor for earth cover weight (Section 10.4.3)

minimum_dimensions.notes: From RDM 4.2 Section 10.2. Pipe diameter >= 450 mm. Box culvert >= 500 mm span x 450 mm height. For culverts > 12 m long, min 1.2 m for maintenance access. Fill height >= 0.90 m for granular bedding; below this, concrete surround required.

pipe_bedding_classes.notes: Flat trench bottom, no shaped bedding

construction_materials.notes: Densities from RDM 4.2 Table 3.1. K0 = 0.5 for at-rest conditions (rigid box culverts). Typical fill values for compacted granular material.

design_return_periods.description: Design flow return periods for culverts (Table 2.5)
